blocks.text: Man City close to three — game in hand flips the title race
Arsenal led by six entering the weekend. City's 2-1 comeback at the Etihad cuts it to three — and Guardiola's men have a game in hand. The title race has a new favourite.
🎮 IEM Rio 2026 underway — rain (100 Thieves) in the CS2 Major, Norway's icon on the biggest stage
🎾 Mutua Madrid Open begins today — Ruud targets his strongest clay event, Masters 1000 from 06:00
🎮 Thu 17:00 — rain's 100 Thieves face BIG at CCT Global Finals, Portugal
